scripts.test: node --check server.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8');const scripts=[...html.matchAll(/<script(?:[^>]*)>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/g)].map((match)=>match[1].trim()).filter(Boolean);if(!scripts.length) throw new Error('Inline script not found'); new Function(scripts[scripts.length-1]); console.log('Client script syntax OK');"
